title: Ratchet Workflow Configuration
description: v2 workflow configuration — extends v1 config with components, phases, guards, and progress tracking

version.description: Schema version — must be 2 for workflow.yaml

escalation.description: Escalation policy when max_rounds reached without consensus

adapter.description: Work tracking adapter — failures never block debates

components.description: Logical groupings of files with per-component workflow policies

pairs.description: Agent pairs — generative + adversarial debate partners

phase.description: Ordered development phase — plan → test → build → review → harden

workflow_preset.description: Workflow preset selecting phase subsets. tdd: plan→test→build→review→harden. traditional: plan→build→review→harden. review-only: review only.

scope.description: Comma-separated file glob patterns for this component

workflow.description: Which phases apply to this component

component.description: Component this pair belongs to (must match a component name)

phase.description: Phase this pair runs in — defaults to 'review' for v1 backward compat

scope.description: Comma-separated file glob patterns this pair reviews

command.description: Shell command to execute — exit 0 = pass, non-zero = fail

phase.description: Phase boundary where this guard runs (after phase completes)

blocking.description: If true, failure blocks advancement to next phase. If false, advisory only.

components.description: Components this guard applies to (empty = all components)
